What travelers are saying
  • Teresa K
    11 contributions
    Birthday celebration with an escape room.
    We love escape rooms and was looking for something different in our area. This place did not let us down. Great attention to detail the room was a lot of fun. You’re able to ask for hints if needed. There’s no clock to make you feel too pressured, but you can ask for time at any point. We all had a great time and looking forward to doing the other two rooms. We will probably even travel to Ocala. Huge shout out to Jacob who made sure we had a great time!
    Review of: Huddys Escape
    Written December 21, 2025
  •
    Skye
    Sarasota, FL2 contributions
    Essential knowledge for everyone!
    Spent a weekend compeleting their wilderness first aid course in Gainesville. I have nothing but great things to say about FOLC farm. Amazing and passionate instructors, great curriculum, hands on learning and amazing property/facilities. Highly recommend visiting FOLC farm if you're looking for practical knowledge and skills that could save lives.
    Review of: The FOLC Farm
    Written February 12, 2026
  •
    Kevin F
    1 contribution
    Great location, wonderful gamemaster!
    We have been twice and love the place! Once so we could test it out for a 5th grade birthday party....and then the dreaded party itself! Five 11 year olds and it was chaotic, but everything about this place is amazing.

    The rooms have great difficulty, are fun, interactive and the staff is incredible! We've only had the pleasure of working with Zee and she is cool as (well it says I'm not supposed to use profane language) so she cool as heck. Very understanding, kind and helpful.

    Overall atmosphere of the building itself and the game rooms are great, with dark hallways and great looming rooms. Both experiences 5 star!
    Review of: Huddys Escape
    Written May 17, 2026
  •
    Olivia E
    Sarasota, FL21 contributions
    Amazing Gainesville gem with quality instruction!
    This was my 3rd visit to the FOLC Farm to complete my Wilderness First Responder recertification requirement. I did my week-long original WFR certification with Catherine in 2021 and it was the most informative and positive introduction to wilderness care/medicine I could have hoped for. I felt prepared for my job as a Trip Leader for an outdoor education company and was confident in the skills I had learned when issues did arise on trips. I have come back to the FOLC Farm two more times to re-certify and both visits have been equally fulfilling. Catherine is incredible knowledgable and I often have “What would Catherine do?” moments when I am in a real-life scenario of what she’s prepared us all for. I will come back to FOLC Farm for all of my WFR/WFA needs for as long as it’s around!
    Review of: The FOLC Farm
    Written April 16, 2026
  •
    Maps20257765804
    2 contributions
    Another Great Room at Huddy Escape Rooms
    ChronoWhiskey at Huddy Escape Rooms was such a fun, well-designed room with clever puzzles and great flow. Huge shoutout to our game host Adam—awesome energy and hints that kept things moving.
    We’ve officially escaped all 3 rooms here 🗝️✨
    Next stop: Huddy’s in Ocala!
    Review of: Huddys Escape
    Written February 7, 2026
  •
    Blair J
    1 contribution
    WFR
    I can’t recommend the FOLC farm enough. I did my wilderness first responder 8 day course here. The instructor Catherine was incredible. She fostered a safe and fun learning environment while catering to multiple learning styles. She really knows her stuff and her property is beautiful and peaceful. I will definitely return for more certifications.
    Review of: The FOLC Farm
    Written January 6, 2026
  •
    Tanner S
    1 contribution
    team jacob
    jacob was 12/10, the best!! the swords stones and magic room was wonderful! the puzzles were really well thought out, not too easy but not so hard you end up losing interest bc you’re stuck. definitely recommend.
    Review of: Huddys Escape
    Written September 12, 2025
  •
    Ashlyn S
    2 contributions
    First aid is fun!
    Literally a life-saving class. I learned so much from this course and genuinely feel that I could respond to any emergency situation. As someone that works in the outdoors, it makes me (and my family) feel better knowing that I have these important skills. The FOLC was such a comfortable and fun environment too. I'd recommend this to anyone that enjoys any kind of outdoor recreation!!
    Review of: The FOLC Farm
    Written November 12, 2025
  •
    Margaret W
    Austin, TX115 contributions
    Great for all ages and interests.
    We weren't sure what we would see but the Museum was larger and more detailed than we expected. We learned a lot about Florida's natural history and we were quite tickled at several of the exhibits, including the room where you are viewed with a saber tooth cat or mastodons! Very clever and fun for all! The historical detail of early Indian culture was fascinating and well documented as was the flora and fauna. I recommend it for all ages!
    Review of: Florida Museum Of Natural History
    Written March 18, 2025
  •
    Diane K
    Venice, FL4,901 contributions
    Nice free museum
    We spent about 1.5 hours at the museum. It has a variety of types of art. The pieces are well displayed with interesting write ups for each piece. We especially liked the photo section that had a combined exhibit of the building of the Hoover Dam and pictures from NASA.
    Review of: Harn Museum Of Art
    Written January 9, 2026
  •
    DoodyDestination
    Gainesville, FL621 contributions
    Our Favorite Brewery in the WORLD
    We stopped by Swamp Head Brewery last week and then came back again last night for their bingo event benefiting the Crescent Beach Challenge for the Leukemia & Lymphoma Society, and honestly, it just confirmed what we already thought, this is the best brewery we’ve ever been to, and we travel a lot.

    Their beer flights are incredible and the selection is seriously mind blowing. You can tell they put a lot of care into what they brew, and they genuinely deserve every award on the wall. If we could give it a 10 star rating, we absolutely would.

    The staff has always been super friendly and welcoming, and we’ve never really had to wait long for a beer even when it’s busy. We love the outdoor setup and activities, and the whole place has such a relaxed, family friendly vibe that makes you want to stay awhile.

    We tried quite a few different beers across both visits and everything was great, but our personal favorites were the Dole Whip, Gummy Worm, and Pink Starburst flavors.

    Even the bathrooms were spotless both times, which is always a nice bonus and shows how well they take care of the place overall.

    We really love the vibe here and we will definitely be back again soon.
    Review of: Swamp Head Brewery
    Written April 22, 2026
  •
    Mary T
    7 contributions
    Awesome visiit and Wine Tasting!
    The Host at this winery was a lot of fun. She gave a lot of details about the wine. The area was clean and nice. We bought several bottles. The prices were very reasonable. We will be back!
    Review of: Bluefield Estate Winery
    Written March 9, 2026
  •
    Diane K
    Venice, FL4,901 contributions
    Nice variety of art
    We came to check out the artistic items. They were well displayed within a home - including item in the kitchen and bathroom. Many beautiful things that were reasonably priced. There is free parking in a nearby lot or paid parking in front of the store.
    Review of: Artisans' Guild Gallery
    Written January 9, 2026
  •
    KFS_386
    Vermont605 contributions
    It Is What You Make It
    We had a grand time at this attraction. We found there were exhibits that would keep the attention of both youth and adults.

    Along with the Gatorade story, there are also other interesting artifacts such as the Gutenberg press, Tesla coil, Victrola, and more.

    We spent a good two hours here, and would go back again.

    Our only concern was parking. While there are ample spaces, it's difficult to get into the lot, and GPS was no help. Keep your eyes peeled and you'll see where to park.
    Review of: Cade Museum for Creativity & Invention
    Written March 13, 2021
  •
    Thomas P
    Orlando, FL69 contributions
    Love finding great Breweries!!
    1st time in and stopped by on St. Patrick's Day. There was a great band playing and all the staff I met were super friendly and kind. The Irish Red special was amazing as were all the other beers I had tried. Will definitely go again.

    So, if you're in Gainesville and looking to try a tasty brewery add this as one of your stops.
    Review of: Blackadder Brewing Company
    Written March 18, 2026
